name: procurement managers in small e-commerce businesses using Shopify processing 10-20 invoices/month tool
description: For procurement managers in small e-commerce businesses using Shopify processing 10-20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes late orders and supplier penalties. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
target_audience: procurement managers in small e-commerce businesses using Shopify processing 10-20 invoices/month
problem_solved: manual reconciliation of vendor invoices with purchase orders
